sql_blocks.label: Block 1
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT *
FROM PalletPlanningPickGroups
WHERE pickgroupid IN (
    SELECT PickGroupId
    FROM PalletPlanningPickDetails
    WHERE 
        (
            -- normal filters
            (@barcode <> '' AND barcode = @barcode)
            OR (@pickid <> '' AND PickId = @pickid)
            
            -- fallback to location ONLY if both are empty
            OR (
                @barcode = '' 
                AND @pickid = '' 
                AND @warehouselocationid <> ''
                AND SourceLocation = @warehouselocationid
            )
        )
)

sql_blocks.label: Block 1
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT *
FROM PalletPlanningPickDetails d
WHERE 
(
    (@barcode = '' AND @warehouselocationid = '')

    OR

    (@barcode <> '' AND d.pickgroupid IN (
        SELECT pd.pickgroupid
        FROM PalletPlanningPickDetails pd
        WHERE pd.barcode = @barcode
    ))

    OR

    (@barcode = '' AND @warehouselocationid <> '' AND d.pickgroupid IN (
        SELECT pd.pickgroupid
        FROM PalletPlanningPickDetails pd
        WHERE pd.SourceLocation = @warehouselocationid
    ))
)
AND
(
    @pickid = '' 
    OR d.PickGroupId IN (
        SELECT g.PickGroupId
        FROM PalletPlanningPickGroups g
        WHERE g.PickId = @pickid
    )
)

sql_blocks.label: Block 1
Block 1
sql_blocks.sql:
;WITH json_data AS (
    SELECT data
    FROM RawInterfaceData WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    WHERE ServiceId = 'IWSOutbound_PickCommand'
      AND CreatedDate > DATEADD(day, -3, GETDATE())
      AND StatusId = 3
),
results AS (
    SELECT 
        jt.PickId,
        jt.ReleasePriority,
        jt.ExportItem,
        jt.ShipPalletType,
        jt.Destination,
        pd.DeliveryNumber,
        pd.DeliveryLineNumber,
        pd.PickSequenceNumber,
        pd.LocationId,
        pd.Barcode
    FROM json_data AS jd
    CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(jd.data) WITH (
        PickId INT '$.PickId',
        ReleasePriority INT '$.ReleasePriority',
        ExportItem VARCHAR(1) '$.ExportItem',
        ShipPalletType VARCHAR(10) '$.ShipPalletType',
        Destination VARCHAR(10) '$.Destination',
        PickDetail NVARCHAR(MAX) '$.PickDetail' AS JSON
    ) AS jt
    CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(jt.PickDetail) WITH (
        DeliveryNumber VARCHAR(10) '$.DeliveryNumber',
        DeliveryLineNumber VARCHAR(10) '$.DeliveryLineNumber',
        PickSequenceNumber INT '$.PickSequenceNumber',
        LocationId VARCHAR(20) '$.LocationId',
        Barcode VARCHAR(50) '$.Barcode'
    ) AS pd
)
SELECT *
FROM results
WHERE 
    (@pickid = '' OR PickId = @pickid)
    AND (@warehouselocationid = '' OR LocationId = @warehouselocationid)
    AND (@barcode = '' OR Barcode = @barcode);

sql_blocks.label: Block 1
sql_blocks.sql:
;WITH json_data AS (
    SELECT data
    FROM RawInterfaceData WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
    WHERE ServiceId = 'IWSPickAbort'
      AND CreatedDate > DATEADD(day, -3, GETDATE())
      AND StatusId = 3
),
results AS (
    SELECT 
        jt.UniqueIdentifier,
        jt.PickAbortId,
        jt.DeliveryNumber,
        jt.DeliveryLineNumber,
        jt.PickId,
        jt.PickGroupId,
        jt.LocationId,
        jt.InventoryType,
        jt.Barcode,
        jt.NeedReplacementBox,
        jt.AbortReasonId,
        jt.AbortReason
    FROM json_data AS jd
    CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(jd.data) WITH (
        UniqueIdentifier VARCHAR(MAX) '$.UniqueIdentifier',
        PickAbortId VARCHAR(MAX) '$.PickAbortId',
        DeliveryNumber VARCHAR(MAX) '$.DeliveryNumber',
        DeliveryLineNumber VARCHAR(MAX) '$.DeliveryLineNumber',
        PickId INT '$.PickId',
        PickGroupId INT '$.PickGroupId',
        LocationId VARCHAR(MAX) '$.LocationId',
        InventoryType VARCHAR(MAX) '$.InventoryType',
        Barcode VARCHAR(MAX) '$.Barcode',
        NeedReplacementBox VARCHAR(MAX) '$.NeedReplacementBox',
        AbortReasonId VARCHAR(MAX) '$.AbortReasonId',
        AbortReason VARCHAR(MAX) '$.AbortReason'
    ) AS jt
)
SELECT *
FROM results
WHERE 
    (@pickid = '' OR PickId = @pickid)
    AND (@warehouselocationid = '' OR LocationId = @warehouselocationid)
    AND (@barcode = '' OR Barcode = @barcode);
